series_metadata.series_description: Prosecuted cases by the Ohio Attorney General's Office (AGO) that rise to the conviction of a misdemeanor or minor misdemeanor violation. Records include, but are not limited to, pleadings, memorandum, affidavits, attorney work product, legal research, motions, judgments, discovery, evidence, transcripts, correspondence, settlement and negotiation documents, hearing and deposition materials, and reports from local law enforcement.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: from case closing. If case resulted in a not guilty verdict or no bills, 2 years from case closing. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately. ; Electronic: from case closing. If case resulted in a not guilty verdict or no bills, 2 years from case closing
